allow: Bash(python -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) issues = data['issues']['nodes'] print\(f'Total: {data[\\"issues\\"][\\"totalCount\\"]}'\) for i in issues: key = i.get\('key',''\) summary = i.get\('summary',''\) status = i.get\('fields',{}\).get\('status',{}\).get\('name',''\) if i.get\('fields'\) else '' itype = i.get\('fields',{}\).get\('issuetype',{}\).get\('name',''\) if i.get\('fields'\) else '' project = i.get\('fields',{}\).get\('project',{}\).get\('name',''\) if i.get\('fields'\) else '' print\(f' [{key}] \({itype}\) {summary} | Status: {status} | Project: {project}'\) ")
